Export type
🚶 Walk list — canvassing order
Sorted by street name then house number. Canvassers walk in sequence, no backtracking.
📞 Phone bank list
Mobile-first. Includes name, precinct, segment, party, phone number.
📦 Per-volunteer packets
One CSV per precinct, walk-sorted. Assign one file per volunteer.
📋 Contact log sheet
Walk-sorted with blank Result / Notes and Follow-up columns pre-formatted for field use.
File format
CSV XLSX (CSV compatible) VAN walk list layout
Per-volunteer export: one CSV file will be generated per precinct in the filtered results, each walk-sorted. Download one and repeat for each precinct, or use the precinct filter above to generate them individually.
